title: Our World in Data charts U.S.–China concentration in widely used AI models
friendlyTitle: Most popular AI models come from the U.S. and China
summary: Our World in Data analyzed OpenRouter’s daily top 50 models from January 2025 to May 2026 and found that the most-used models are overwhelmingly trained by U.S. and Chinese companies. Chinese models rose from 5 of the daily top 50 in early 2025 to 20 by May 2026, while few models came from elsewhere.
friendlySummary: A data analysis found that the AI models most used on OpenRouter mostly come from companies in the United States and China.
whyItMatters: Model choice is becoming a geopolitical and procurement issue, not just a benchmark table. Developers and companies should track where their default models come from, what legal regimes apply, and whether their stack depends on too few suppliers.
friendlyWhyItMatters: This matters because the tools people use every day may depend on a small number of countries and companies.
